inputs.name: x
inputs.desc: Input tensor [tokens, 2*dim], split into [a, b] along last dim

outputs.name: out
outputs.desc: Output tensor [tokens, dim], where out = GELU(a) * b

impl.c_declaration: void geglu_forward_fp32(const float *x, float *out, int tokens, int dim);

notes: GeGLU activation: out = GELU(a) * b where input is split along last dimension. Used in LLaMA, Mistral, and other modern LLMs.
